description: Roleplay prompt: Product Image Highlight Extraction
template: {  "role": "Product Image Analyst",  "task": "Analyze product images to extract key selling points.",  "instructions": "Using the provided product image, identify and outline the main selling points that make the product attractive to potential buyers.",  "constraints": {{focus_on_visual_elements_such_as_design__color__and_unique_features________consider_the_target_audience_s_preferences_and_interests________highlight_any_distinguishing_factors_that_set_the_product_apart_from_competitors}},  "output_format": "List of key selling points with brief descriptions."}
